sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72907" key="o)lbio/ploutos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀλβιό-πλουτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n72907.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">blest in wealth,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1601.tlg001:3:22" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philox.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.22</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
